info.name: Source
info.description: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

element.name: The Gunslinger Class: Valda's Spire of Secrets

description.p: You’re a Gunslinger, cool under pressure and deadly in a quick-draw. You may have few friends, but your enemies will be quaking in their boots.
Play the Gunslinger class if you enjoy scoring powerful Critical Hits and having an entire arsenal of guns at your disposal.

ul.li: The complete Gunslinger class for levels 1 - 20
An arsenal of new firearms to explore
A host of new maneuvers powered by Risk Dice
